summary: Successfully tested new Asset Auto-ID and Bulk Intake features. All 16 backend tests passed (after fixing location lookup bug). Frontend UI verified: Auto Asset-ID display (TSRID-TAB-i7-XXXX), Bulk modal with preview, and form inputs working correctly.

issues: Minor: React key warning in console - 'Encountered two children with the same key' - non-blocking but should be addressed

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: assign_asset_to_location_by_sn was querying tenant_locations with direct location_id match instead of using find_location helper which supports location_code lookup
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/asset_management_v2.py - Line 3954-3957: Changed to use find_location() helper for location lookup
/app/backend/tests/test_asset_auto_id.py - New test file with 16 test cases
seed_data_creation: Test assets created and cleaned up automatically during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Asset Auto-ID features working. To access: 1) Go to /portal/admin 2) Login with admin@tsrid.com/admin123 3) Click 'Assets' tab 4) Click 'Wareneingang' sub-tab. The page shows auto-generated Asset-IDs in green banner (TSRID-TAB-i7-XXXX) and Bulk button opens modal with preview.

features_tested.GET /api/asset-mgmt/asset-id-config: PASS - Returns config with warehouse_prefix and formats
features_tested.GET /api/asset-mgmt/asset-id-config/next: PASS - Returns next ID for given asset type (e.g., TSRID-TAB-i7-0005)
features_tested.POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/intake-wi: PASS - Creates asset with auto-generated warehouse ID
features_tested.POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/intake-bu: PASS - Creates multiple assets with sequential IDs
features_tested.POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/assign-to: PASS - Assigns asset to location and generates location-based ID
features_tested.Frontend: Auto Asset-ID display: PASS - Green banner shows 'Nächste Asset-ID (Lager): TSRID-TAB-i7-XXXX'
features_tested.Frontend: Bulk modal opens: PASS - Modal shows with Gerätetyp, Anzahl, and preview
features_tested.Frontend: Bulk preview shows IDs: PASS - Shows 'Erste ID: TSRID-TAB-i7-XXXX' and 'Gesamt: N Geräte'

bug_fix_applied.issue: assign_asset_to_location_by_sn endpoint was returning 404 for valid locations
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Direct query {'location_id': location_id} on tenant_locations collection failed because the collection uses 'location_code' field instead
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed to use find_location() helper which uses $or query to check both location_code and location_id fields
bug_fix_applied.verification: All 16 backend tests now pass including assign-to-location tests
